{{Relic Infobox|Neow's Bones|2}}
{{R|Neow's Bones||2}} are an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}.

== Sources ==
At the start of the run, can be offered by {{KW|Neow||2}}.

== Trivia ==
* Historically, dice were made out of many different animals' bones (including whale bones), which is why {{R|Neow's Bones||2}} resemble modern dice.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.103.2'''
**Added Neow's Bones to the game.
